// ============================================================================
// Real-time Streaming: Persistent WebSocket + Topic-based Pub/Sub - Phase 6
// Subscription Management, Message Replay, Backpressure (500줄)
// ============================================================================

// Stream Subscription
struct StreamSubscription
  subscriptionId: string
  clientId: string
  topic: string
  filters: map<string, any>
  createdAt: number
  isActive: bool
  messageCount: number

// Topic Message
struct TopicMessage
  messageId: string
  topic: string
  timestamp: number
  data: string
  sender: string
  priority: number

// Streaming Configuration
struct StreamingConfig
  maxSubscriptionsPerClient: number
  queueSize: number
  heartbeatInterval: number
  maxBacklogMessages: number
  maxMessageSize: number

// Streaming Server
struct StreamingServer
  subscriptions: array<StreamSubscription>
  topicQueues: map<string, array<TopicMessage>>
  clientSubscriptions: map<string, array<string>>
  config: StreamingConfig
  stats: map<string, any>

// Create new streaming server
fn newStreamingServer(config: StreamingConfig) -> StreamingServer
  {
    "subscriptions": [],
    "topicQueues": {},
    "clientSubscriptions": {},
    "config": config,
    "stats": {
      "totalMessages": 0,
      "totalSubscriptions": 0,
      "activeConnections": 0
    }
  }

// Subscribe to topic
fn subscribe(
  server: StreamingServer,
  clientId: string,
  topic: string,
  filters: map<string, any>
) -> Result<string, string>
  // Check subscription limit
  let clientSubs = server["clientSubscriptions"][clientId] || []
  if clientSubs.length() >= server["config"]["maxSubscriptionsPerClient"]
    return Err("Max subscriptions exceeded")

  // Create subscription
  let subscriptionId = generateSubscriptionId(clientId + topic)
  let subscription = {
    "subscriptionId": subscriptionId,
    "clientId": clientId,
    "topic": topic,
    "filters": filters,
    "createdAt": getCurrentTime(),
    "isActive": true,
    "messageCount": 0
  }

  server["subscriptions"].append(subscription)
  clientSubs.append(subscriptionId)
  server["clientSubscriptions"][clientId] = clientSubs

  // Initialize topic queue if needed
  if server["topicQueues"][topic] == nil
    server["topicQueues"][topic] = []

  Ok(subscriptionId)

// Unsubscribe from topic
fn unsubscribe(
  server: StreamingServer,
  subscriptionId: string
) -> Result<bool, string>
  let newSubs = []
  let found = false

  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["subscriptionId"] != subscriptionId
      newSubs.append(sub)
    else
      found = true

  if !found
    return Err("Subscription not found")

  server["subscriptions"] = newSubs
  Ok(true)

// Publish message to topic
fn publish(
  server: StreamingServer,
  topic: string,
  message: string,
  sender: string
) -> Result<number, string>
  // Check message size
  if message.length() > server["config"]["maxMessageSize"]
    return Err("Message too large")

  // Create message
  let msg = {
    "messageId": generateMessageId(),
    "topic": topic,
    "timestamp": getCurrentTime(),
    "data": message,
    "sender": sender,
    "priority": 0
  }

  // Initialize queue if needed
  if server["topicQueues"][topic] == nil
    server["topicQueues"][topic] = []

  // Add to queue
  let queue = server["topicQueues"][topic]
  queue.append(msg)

  // Trim old messages if exceeding queue size
  if queue.length() > server["config"]["queueSize"]
    let newQueue = []
    let startIdx = queue.length() - server["config"]["queueSize"]
    for i = startIdx to queue.length()
      newQueue.append(queue[i])
    server["topicQueues"][topic] = newQueue

  server["stats"]["totalMessages"] = server["stats"]["totalMessages"] + 1

  // Count subscribers
  let subscriberCount = 0
  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["topic"] == topic
      subscriberCount = subscriberCount + 1

  Ok(subscriberCount)

// Get subscription by ID
fn getSubscription(
  server: StreamingServer,
  subscriptionId: string
) -> Result<StreamSubscription, string>
  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["subscriptionId"] == subscriptionId
      return Ok(sub)
  Err("Subscription not found")

// List subscriptions for client
fn listSubscriptions(
  server: StreamingServer,
  clientId: string
) -> array<StreamSubscription>
  let result = []
  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["clientId"] == clientId
      result.append(sub)
  result

// Replay messages from timestamp
fn replayMessages(
  server: StreamingServer,
  subscriptionId: string,
  fromTimestamp: number
) -> Result<array<TopicMessage>, string>
  // Get subscription
  let subscription = nil
  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["subscriptionId"] == subscriptionId
      subscription = sub

  if subscription == nil
    return Err("Subscription not found")

  // Get messages from topic
  let topic = subscription["topic"]
  let queue = server["topicQueues"][topic] || []
  let result = []

  for msg in queue
    if msg["timestamp"] >= fromTimestamp
      // Apply filters
      if matchesFilters(msg, subscription["filters"])
        result.append(msg)

  Ok(result)

// Check if message matches subscription filters
fn matchesFilters(
  message: TopicMessage,
  filters: map<string, any>
) -> bool
  if filters == nil || filters.length() == 0
    return true

  // Simple filter matching
  for key in filters.keys()
    let filterValue = filters[key]
    if message["data"] != filterValue
      return false

  true

// Handle backpressure for client
fn handleBackpressure(
  server: StreamingServer,
  clientId: string
) -> bool
  let subs = server["clientSubscriptions"][clientId] || []
  let totalPending = 0

  for subId in subs
    let sub = nil
    for s in server["subscriptions"]
      if s["subscriptionId"] == subId
        sub = s
    if sub != nil
      totalPending = totalPending + sub["messageCount"]

  // Backpressure if pending > threshold
  totalPending > server["config"]["maxBacklogMessages"]

// Set subscription filter
fn setSubscriptionFilter(
  server: StreamingServer,
  subscriptionId: string,
  filters: map<string, any>
) -> Result<bool, string>
  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["subscriptionId"] == subscriptionId
      sub["filters"] = filters
      return Ok(true)
  Err("Subscription not found")

// Get subscription messages
fn getSubscriptionMessages(
  server: StreamingServer,
  subscriptionId: string
) -> Result<array<TopicMessage>, string>
  let sub = nil
  for s in server["subscriptions"]
    if s["subscriptionId"] == subscriptionId
      sub = s

  if sub == nil
    return Err("Subscription not found")

  let topic = sub["topic"]
  let queue = server["topicQueues"][topic] || []
  Ok(queue)

// Acknowledge message receipt
fn acknowledgeMessage(
  server: StreamingServer,
  subscriptionId: string,
  messageId: string
) -> Result<bool, string>
  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["subscriptionId"] == subscriptionId
      sub["messageCount"] = sub["messageCount"] - 1
      return Ok(true)
  Err("Subscription not found")

// Get topic statistics
fn getTopicStats(
  server: StreamingServer,
  topic: string
) -> map<string, any>
  let queue = server["topicQueues"][topic] || []
  let subscriberCount = 0

  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["topic"] == topic && sub["isActive"]
      subscriberCount = subscriberCount + 1

  {
    "topic": topic,
    "queueSize": queue.length(),
    "subscribers": subscriberCount,
    "oldestMessage": if queue.length() > 0 then queue[0]["timestamp"] else 0,
    "newestMessage": if queue.length() > 0 then queue[queue.length() - 1]["timestamp"] else 0
  }

// Clean up inactive subscriptions
fn cleanupInactiveSubscriptions(server: StreamingServer) -> number
  let count = 0
  let active = []

  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["isActive"]
      active.append(sub)
    else
      count = count + 1

  server["subscriptions"] = active
  count

// Send heartbeat to all subscribers
fn broadcastHeartbeat(server: StreamingServer) -> number
  let count = 0
  let heartbeat = {
    "messageId": generateMessageId(),
    "topic": "system:heartbeat",
    "timestamp": getCurrentTime(),
    "data": "heartbeat",
    "sender": "system",
    "priority": 100
  }

  for topic in server["topicQueues"].keys()
    if topic != "system:heartbeat"
      let queue = server["topicQueues"][topic] || []
      queue.append(heartbeat)
      count = count + 1

  count

// Get streaming statistics
fn getStreamingStats(server: StreamingServer) -> string
  "Streaming Statistics:\n" +
  "  Total Subscriptions: " + toString(server["stats"]["totalSubscriptions"]) + "\n" +
  "  Total Messages: " + toString(server["stats"]["totalMessages"]) + "\n" +
  "  Active Connections: " + toString(server["stats"]["activeConnections"]) + "\n" +
  "  Topics: " + toString(server["topicQueues"].length()) + "\n" +
  "  Max Queue Size: " + toString(server["config"]["queueSize"])

// Helper: Generate subscription ID
fn generateSubscriptionId(seed: string) -> string
  let id = ""
  for i = 0 to 16
    id = id + toString((i * 31 + seed.length()) % 16)
  "sub-" + id

// Helper: Generate message ID
fn generateMessageId() -> string
  let id = ""
  for i = 0 to 12
    id = id + toString((i * 23 + 19) % 16)
  "msg-" + id

// Helper: Get current time
fn getCurrentTime() -> number
  1740998400

// ============================================================================
// Real-time Streaming: Persistent WebSocket + Topic-based Pub/Sub - Phase 6
// Subscription Management, Message Replay, Backpressure (500줄)
// ============================================================================

// Stream Subscription
struct StreamSubscription
  subscriptionId: string
  clientId: string
  topic: string
  filters: map<string, any>
  createdAt: number
  isActive: bool
  messageCount: number

// Topic Message
struct TopicMessage
  messageId: string
  topic: string
  timestamp: number
  data: string
  sender: string
  priority: number

// Streaming Configuration
struct StreamingConfig
  maxSubscriptionsPerClient: number
  queueSize: number
  heartbeatInterval: number
  maxBacklogMessages: number
  maxMessageSize: number

// Streaming Server
struct StreamingServer
  subscriptions: array<StreamSubscription>
  topicQueues: map<string, array<TopicMessage>>
  clientSubscriptions: map<string, array<string>>
  config: StreamingConfig
  stats: map<string, any>

// Create new streaming server
fn newStreamingServer(config: StreamingConfig) -> StreamingServer
  {
    "subscriptions": [],
    "topicQueues": {},
    "clientSubscriptions": {},
    "config": config,
    "stats": {
      "totalMessages": 0,
      "totalSubscriptions": 0,
      "activeConnections": 0
    }
  }

// Subscribe to topic
fn subscribe(
  server: StreamingServer,
  clientId: string,
  topic: string,
  filters: map<string, any>
) -> Result<string, string>
  // Check subscription limit
  let clientSubs = server["clientSubscriptions"][clientId] || []
  if clientSubs.length() >= server["config"]["maxSubscriptionsPerClient"]
    return Err("Max subscriptions exceeded")

  // Create subscription
  let subscriptionId = generateSubscriptionId(clientId + topic)
  let subscription = {
    "subscriptionId": subscriptionId,
    "clientId": clientId,
    "topic": topic,
    "filters": filters,
    "createdAt": getCurrentTime(),
    "isActive": true,
    "messageCount": 0
  }

  server["subscriptions"].append(subscription)
  clientSubs.append(subscriptionId)
  server["clientSubscriptions"][clientId] = clientSubs

  // Initialize topic queue if needed
  if server["topicQueues"][topic] == nil
    server["topicQueues"][topic] = []

  Ok(subscriptionId)

// Unsubscribe from topic
fn unsubscribe(
  server: StreamingServer,
  subscriptionId: string
) -> Result<bool, string>
  let newSubs = []
  let found = false

  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["subscriptionId"] != subscriptionId
      newSubs.append(sub)
    else
      found = true

  if !found
    return Err("Subscription not found")

  server["subscriptions"] = newSubs
  Ok(true)

// Publish message to topic
fn publish(
  server: StreamingServer,
  topic: string,
  message: string,
  sender: string
) -> Result<number, string>
  // Check message size
  if message.length() > server["config"]["maxMessageSize"]
    return Err("Message too large")

  // Create message
  let msg = {
    "messageId": generateMessageId(),
    "topic": topic,
    "timestamp": getCurrentTime(),
    "data": message,
    "sender": sender,
    "priority": 0
  }

  // Initialize queue if needed
  if server["topicQueues"][topic] == nil
    server["topicQueues"][topic] = []

  // Add to queue
  let queue = server["topicQueues"][topic]
  queue.append(msg)

  // Trim old messages if exceeding queue size
  if queue.length() > server["config"]["queueSize"]
    let newQueue = []
    let startIdx = queue.length() - server["config"]["queueSize"]
    for i = startIdx to queue.length()
      newQueue.append(queue[i])
    server["topicQueues"][topic] = newQueue

  server["stats"]["totalMessages"] = server["stats"]["totalMessages"] + 1

  // Count subscribers
  let subscriberCount = 0
  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["topic"] == topic
      subscriberCount = subscriberCount + 1

  Ok(subscriberCount)

// Get subscription by ID
fn getSubscription(
  server: StreamingServer,
  subscriptionId: string
) -> Result<StreamSubscription, string>
  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["subscriptionId"] == subscriptionId
      return Ok(sub)
  Err("Subscription not found")

// List subscriptions for client
fn listSubscriptions(
  server: StreamingServer,
  clientId: string
) -> array<StreamSubscription>
  let result = []
  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["clientId"] == clientId
      result.append(sub)
  result

// Replay messages from timestamp
fn replayMessages(
  server: StreamingServer,
  subscriptionId: string,
  fromTimestamp: number
) -> Result<array<TopicMessage>, string>
  // Get subscription
  let subscription = nil
  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["subscriptionId"] == subscriptionId
      subscription = sub

  if subscription == nil
    return Err("Subscription not found")

  // Get messages from topic
  let topic = subscription["topic"]
  let queue = server["topicQueues"][topic] || []
  let result = []

  for msg in queue
    if msg["timestamp"] >= fromTimestamp
      // Apply filters
      if matchesFilters(msg, subscription["filters"])
        result.append(msg)

  Ok(result)

// Check if message matches subscription filters
fn matchesFilters(
  message: TopicMessage,
  filters: map<string, any>
) -> bool
  if filters == nil || filters.length() == 0
    return true

  // Simple filter matching
  for key in filters.keys()
    let filterValue = filters[key]
    if message["data"] != filterValue
      return false

  true

// Handle backpressure for client
fn handleBackpressure(
  server: StreamingServer,
  clientId: string
) -> bool
  let subs = server["clientSubscriptions"][clientId] || []
  let totalPending = 0

  for subId in subs
    let sub = nil
    for s in server["subscriptions"]
      if s["subscriptionId"] == subId
        sub = s
    if sub != nil
      totalPending = totalPending + sub["messageCount"]

  // Backpressure if pending > threshold
  totalPending > server["config"]["maxBacklogMessages"]

// Set subscription filter
fn setSubscriptionFilter(
  server: StreamingServer,
  subscriptionId: string,
  filters: map<string, any>
) -> Result<bool, string>
  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["subscriptionId"] == subscriptionId
      sub["filters"] = filters
      return Ok(true)
  Err("Subscription not found")

// Get subscription messages
fn getSubscriptionMessages(
  server: StreamingServer,
  subscriptionId: string
) -> Result<array<TopicMessage>, string>
  let sub = nil
  for s in server["subscriptions"]
    if s["subscriptionId"] == subscriptionId
      sub = s

  if sub == nil
    return Err("Subscription not found")

  let topic = sub["topic"]
  let queue = server["topicQueues"][topic] || []
  Ok(queue)

// Acknowledge message receipt
fn acknowledgeMessage(
  server: StreamingServer,
  subscriptionId: string,
  messageId: string
) -> Result<bool, string>
  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["subscriptionId"] == subscriptionId
      sub["messageCount"] = sub["messageCount"] - 1
      return Ok(true)
  Err("Subscription not found")

// Get topic statistics
fn getTopicStats(
  server: StreamingServer,
  topic: string
) -> map<string, any>
  let queue = server["topicQueues"][topic] || []
  let subscriberCount = 0

  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["topic"] == topic && sub["isActive"]
      subscriberCount = subscriberCount + 1

  {
    "topic": topic,
    "queueSize": queue.length(),
    "subscribers": subscriberCount,
    "oldestMessage": if queue.length() > 0 then queue[0]["timestamp"] else 0,
    "newestMessage": if queue.length() > 0 then queue[queue.length() - 1]["timestamp"] else 0
  }

// Clean up inactive subscriptions
fn cleanupInactiveSubscriptions(server: StreamingServer) -> number
  let count = 0
  let active = []

  for sub in server["subscriptions"]
    if sub["isActive"]
      active.append(sub)
    else
      count = count + 1

  server["subscriptions"] = active
  count

// Send heartbeat to all subscribers
fn broadcastHeartbeat(server: StreamingServer) -> number
  let count = 0
  let heartbeat = {
    "messageId": generateMessageId(),
    "topic": "system:heartbeat",
    "timestamp": getCurrentTime(),
    "data": "heartbeat",
    "sender": "system",
    "priority": 100
  }

  for topic in server["topicQueues"].keys()
    if topic != "system:heartbeat"
      let queue = server["topicQueues"][topic] || []
      queue.append(heartbeat)
      count = count + 1

  count

// Get streaming statistics
fn getStreamingStats(server: StreamingServer) -> string
  "Streaming Statistics:\n" +
  "  Total Subscriptions: " + toString(server["stats"]["totalSubscriptions"]) + "\n" +
  "  Total Messages: " + toString(server["stats"]["totalMessages"]) + "\n" +
  "  Active Connections: " + toString(server["stats"]["activeConnections"]) + "\n" +
  "  Topics: " + toString(server["topicQueues"].length()) + "\n" +
  "  Max Queue Size: " + toString(server["config"]["queueSize"])

// Helper: Generate subscription ID
fn generateSubscriptionId(seed: string) -> string
  let id = ""
  for i = 0 to 16
    id = id + toString((i * 31 + seed.length()) % 16)
  "sub-" + id

// Helper: Generate message ID
fn generateMessageId() -> string

// ============================================================================
// Multi-tenant Support: Tenant Isolation & Resource Quotas - Phase 6 Track A
// Billing Integration, Feature Flags (500줄)
// ============================================================================

// Tenant Definition
struct Tenant
  tenantId: string
  name: string
  owner: string
  createdAt: number
  status: string
  tierLevel: number

// Tenant Quota
struct TenantQuota
  tenantId: string
  maxVectors: number
  maxRequests: number
  maxStorageGB: number
  maxConcurrentConnections: number
  featureFlags: array<string>

// Tenant Resource
struct TenantResource
  tenantId: string
  resourceId: string
  ownerId: string
  createdAt: number
  resourceType: string

// Tenant Billing
struct TenantBilling
  tenantId: string
  billingPeriod: string
  vectorsCreated: number
  requestsProcessed: number
  storageUsedGB: number
  cost: number
  status: string

// Tenant Manager
struct TenantManager
  tenants: map<string, Tenant>
  quotas: map<string, TenantQuota>
  resources: array<TenantResource>
  billing: array<TenantBilling>
  pricingTiers: map<string, map<string, any>>

// Create tenant manager
fn newTenantManager() -> TenantManager
  {
    "tenants": {},
    "quotas": {},
    "resources": [],
    "billing": [],
    "pricingTiers": {
      "free": {
        "baseCost": 0,
        "maxVectors": 1000,
        "maxRequests": 100,
        "maxStorageGB": 1,
        "maxConcurrentConnections": 5,
        "features": ["basic_search"]
      },
      "pro": {
        "baseCost": 99,
        "maxVectors": 100000,
        "maxRequests": 10000,
        "maxStorageGB": 100,
        "maxConcurrentConnections": 50,
        "features": ["basic_search", "advanced_search", "api_access", "webhooks"]
      },
      "enterprise": {
        "baseCost": 0,
        "maxVectors": 999999999,
        "maxRequests": 999999999,
        "maxStorageGB": 999999,
        "maxConcurrentConnections": 999,
        "features": ["all"]
      }
    }
  }

// Create tenant
fn createTenant(
  manager: TenantManager,
  name: string,
  owner: string,
  tierLevel: number
) -> Result<Tenant, string>
  let tenantId = generateTenantId(name)

  let tenant = {
    "tenantId": tenantId,
    "name": name,
    "owner": owner,
    "createdAt": getCurrentTime(),
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "tierLevel": tierLevel
  }

  manager["tenants"][tenantId] = tenant

  // Set quota based on tier
  let tierName = ""
  match tierLevel
    1 -> tierName = "free"
    2 -> tierName = "pro"
    3 -> tierName = "enterprise"
    _ -> tierName = "free"

  let tierConfig = manager["pricingTiers"][tierName] || {}
  let quota = {
    "tenantId": tenantId,
    "maxVectors": tierConfig["maxVectors"] || 1000,
    "maxRequests": tierConfig["maxRequests"] || 100,
    "maxStorageGB": tierConfig["maxStorageGB"] || 1,
    "maxConcurrentConnections": tierConfig["maxConcurrentConnections"] || 5,
    "featureFlags": tierConfig["features"] || []
  }

  manager["quotas"][tenantId] = quota

  Ok(tenant)

// Get tenant
fn getTenant(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string
) -> Result<Tenant, string>
  let tenant = manager["tenants"][tenantId]
  if tenant == nil
    Err("Tenant not found")
  else
    Ok(tenant)

// Update tenant quota
fn updateTenantQuota(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string,
  quota: TenantQuota
) -> Result<TenantQuota, string>
  if manager["tenants"][tenantId] == nil
    return Err("Tenant not found")

  manager["quotas"][tenantId] = quota
  Ok(quota)

// Allocate resource to tenant
fn allocateResource(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string,
  resourceId: string,
  ownerId: string
) -> Result<bool, string>
  if manager["tenants"][tenantId] == nil
    return Err("Tenant not found")

  let resource = {
    "tenantId": tenantId,
    "resourceId": resourceId,
    "ownerId": ownerId,
    "createdAt": getCurrentTime(),
    "resourceType": "vector"
  }

  manager["resources"].append(resource)
  Ok(true)

// Check quota
fn checkQuota(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string,
  resourceType: string,
  count: number
) -> Result<bool, string>
  let quota = manager["quotas"][tenantId]
  if quota == nil
    return Err("Tenant not found")

  match resourceType
    "vectors" ->
      let used = 0
      for resource in manager["resources"]
        if resource["tenantId"] == tenantId && resource["resourceType"] == "vector"
          used = used + 1
      if used + count > quota["maxVectors"]
        Err("Vector quota exceeded")
      else
        Ok(true)
    "requests" ->
      Ok(true)
    _ -> Ok(true)

// Get tenant resources
fn getTenantResources(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string
) -> array<TenantResource>
  let result = []
  for resource in manager["resources"]
    if resource["tenantId"] == tenantId
      result.append(resource)
  result

// Delete resource
fn deleteResource(
  manager: TenantManager,
  resourceId: string
) -> Result<bool, string>
  let newResources = []
  let found = false

  for resource in manager["resources"]
    if resource["resourceId"] != resourceId
      newResources.append(resource)
    else
      found = true

  if !found
    return Err("Resource not found")

  manager["resources"] = newResources
  Ok(true)

// Generate billing record
fn generateBillingRecord(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string,
  billingPeriod: string,
  vectorsCreated: number,
  requestsProcessed: number,
  storageUsedGB: number
) -> Result<TenantBilling, string>
  let tenant = manager["tenants"][tenantId]
  if tenant == nil
    return Err("Tenant not found")

  // Get tier config
  let tierName = ""
  match tenant["tierLevel"]
    1 -> tierName = "free"
    2 -> tierName = "pro"
    3 -> tierName = "enterprise"
    _ -> tierName = "free"

  let tierConfig = manager["pricingTiers"][tierName] || {}
  let baseCost = tierConfig["baseCost"] || 0

  // Calculate costs
  let vectorCost = 0
  let requestCost = 0
  let storageCost = 0

  // Simple pricing model
  match tierName
    "free" ->
      vectorCost = if vectorsCreated > 1000 then (vectorsCreated - 1000) * 0.001 else 0
      requestCost = if requestsProcessed > 100 then (requestsProcessed - 100) * 0.0001 else 0
      storageCost = if storageUsedGB > 1 then (storageUsedGB - 1) * 0.5 else 0
    "pro" ->
      vectorCost = if vectorsCreated > 100000 then (vectorsCreated - 100000) * 0.0001 else 0
      requestCost = if requestsProcessed > 10000 then (requestsProcessed - 10000) * 0.00001 else 0
      storageCost = if storageUsedGB > 100 then (storageUsedGB - 100) * 0.1 else 0
    _ ->
      vectorCost = 0
      requestCost = 0
      storageCost = 0

  let totalCost = baseCost + vectorCost + requestCost + storageCost

  let billing = {
    "tenantId": tenantId,
    "billingPeriod": billingPeriod,
    "vectorsCreated": vectorsCreated,
    "requestsProcessed": requestsProcessed,
    "storageUsedGB": storageUsedGB,
    "cost": totalCost,
    "status": "PENDING"
  }

  manager["billing"].append(billing)
  Ok(billing)

// Suspend tenant
fn suspendTenant(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string,
  reason: string
) -> Result<bool, string>
  let tenant = manager["tenants"][tenantId]
  if tenant == nil
    return Err("Tenant not found")

  tenant["status"] = "SUSPENDED"
  manager["tenants"][tenantId] = tenant
  Ok(true)

// Activate tenant
fn activateTenant(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string
) -> Result<bool, string>
  let tenant = manager["tenants"][tenantId]
  if tenant == nil
    return Err("Tenant not found")

  tenant["status"] = "ACTIVE"
  manager["tenants"][tenantId] = tenant
  Ok(true)

// Check feature flag
fn hasFeature(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string,
  feature: string
) -> bool
  let quota = manager["quotas"][tenantId]
  if quota == nil
    return false

  for flag in quota["featureFlags"]
    if flag == feature || flag == "all"
      return true

  false

// List all tenants
fn listTenants(manager: TenantManager) -> array<Tenant>
  let result = []
  for tenantId in manager["tenants"].keys()
    result.append(manager["tenants"][tenantId])
  result

// Get tenant statistics
fn getTenantStats(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string
) -> map<string, any>
  let resources = getTenantResources(manager, tenantId)
  let quota = manager["quotas"][tenantId] || {}

  {
    "tenantId": tenantId,
    "resourceCount": resources.length(),
    "maxVectors": quota["maxVectors"] || 0,
    "usedVectors": resources.length(),
    "remainingVectors": (quota["maxVectors"] || 0) - resources.length(),
    "features": quota["featureFlags"] || []
  }

// Migrate tenant data (upgrade/downgrade)
fn migrateTenantData(
  manager: TenantManager,
  sourceTenantId: string,
  targetTenantId: string
) -> Result<number, string>
  let count = 0

  // Copy resources
  for resource in manager["resources"]
    if resource["tenantId"] == sourceTenantId
      let newResource = {
        "tenantId": targetTenantId,
        "resourceId": resource["resourceId"],
        "ownerId": resource["ownerId"],
        "createdAt": getCurrentTime(),
        "resourceType": resource["resourceType"]
      }
      manager["resources"].append(newResource)
      count = count + 1

  Ok(count)

// Helper: Generate tenant ID
fn generateTenantId(name: string) -> string
  let id = ""
  for i = 0 to name.length()
    id = id + toString((i * 13 + name[i] % 256) % 16)
  "tenant-" + id

// Helper: Get current time
fn getCurrentTime() -> number
  1740998400

// ============================================================================
// Multi-tenant Support: Tenant Isolation & Resource Quotas - Phase 6 Track A
// Billing Integration, Feature Flags (500줄)
// ============================================================================

// Tenant Definition
struct Tenant
  tenantId: string
  name: string
  owner: string
  createdAt: number
  status: string
  tierLevel: number

// Tenant Quota
struct TenantQuota
  tenantId: string
  maxVectors: number
  maxRequests: number
  maxStorageGB: number
  maxConcurrentConnections: number
  featureFlags: array<string>

// Tenant Resource
struct TenantResource
  tenantId: string
  resourceId: string
  ownerId: string
  createdAt: number
  resourceType: string

// Tenant Billing
struct TenantBilling
  tenantId: string
  billingPeriod: string
  vectorsCreated: number
  requestsProcessed: number
  storageUsedGB: number
  cost: number
  status: string

// Tenant Manager
struct TenantManager
  tenants: map<string, Tenant>
  quotas: map<string, TenantQuota>
  resources: array<TenantResource>
  billing: array<TenantBilling>
  pricingTiers: map<string, map<string, any>>

// Create tenant manager
fn newTenantManager() -> TenantManager
  {
    "tenants": {},
    "quotas": {},
    "resources": [],
    "billing": [],
    "pricingTiers": {
      "free": {
        "baseCost": 0,
        "maxVectors": 1000,
        "maxRequests": 100,
        "maxStorageGB": 1,
        "maxConcurrentConnections": 5,
        "features": ["basic_search"]
      },
      "pro": {
        "baseCost": 99,
        "maxVectors": 100000,
        "maxRequests": 10000,
        "maxStorageGB": 100,
        "maxConcurrentConnections": 50,
        "features": ["basic_search", "advanced_search", "api_access", "webhooks"]
      },
      "enterprise": {
        "baseCost": 0,
        "maxVectors": 999999999,
        "maxRequests": 999999999,
        "maxStorageGB": 999999,
        "maxConcurrentConnections": 999,
        "features": ["all"]
      }
    }
  }

// Create tenant
fn createTenant(
  manager: TenantManager,
  name: string,
  owner: string,
  tierLevel: number
) -> Result<Tenant, string>
  let tenantId = generateTenantId(name)

  let tenant = {
    "tenantId": tenantId,
    "name": name,
    "owner": owner,
    "createdAt": getCurrentTime(),
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "tierLevel": tierLevel
  }

  manager["tenants"][tenantId] = tenant

  // Set quota based on tier
  let tierName = ""
  match tierLevel
    1 -> tierName = "free"
    2 -> tierName = "pro"
    3 -> tierName = "enterprise"
    _ -> tierName = "free"

  let tierConfig = manager["pricingTiers"][tierName] || {}
  let quota = {
    "tenantId": tenantId,
    "maxVectors": tierConfig["maxVectors"] || 1000,
    "maxRequests": tierConfig["maxRequests"] || 100,
    "maxStorageGB": tierConfig["maxStorageGB"] || 1,
    "maxConcurrentConnections": tierConfig["maxConcurrentConnections"] || 5,
    "featureFlags": tierConfig["features"] || []
  }

  manager["quotas"][tenantId] = quota

  Ok(tenant)

// Get tenant
fn getTenant(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string
) -> Result<Tenant, string>
  let tenant = manager["tenants"][tenantId]
  if tenant == nil
    Err("Tenant not found")
  else
    Ok(tenant)

// Update tenant quota
fn updateTenantQuota(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string,
  quota: TenantQuota
) -> Result<TenantQuota, string>
  if manager["tenants"][tenantId] == nil
    return Err("Tenant not found")

  manager["quotas"][tenantId] = quota
  Ok(quota)

// Allocate resource to tenant
fn allocateResource(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string,
  resourceId: string,
  ownerId: string
) -> Result<bool, string>
  if manager["tenants"][tenantId] == nil
    return Err("Tenant not found")

  let resource = {
    "tenantId": tenantId,
    "resourceId": resourceId,
    "ownerId": ownerId,
    "createdAt": getCurrentTime(),
    "resourceType": "vector"
  }

  manager["resources"].append(resource)
  Ok(true)

// Check quota
fn checkQuota(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string,
  resourceType: string,
  count: number
) -> Result<bool, string>
  let quota = manager["quotas"][tenantId]
  if quota == nil
    return Err("Tenant not found")

  match resourceType
    "vectors" ->
      let used = 0
      for resource in manager["resources"]
        if resource["tenantId"] == tenantId && resource["resourceType"] == "vector"
          used = used + 1
      if used + count > quota["maxVectors"]
        Err("Vector quota exceeded")
      else
        Ok(true)
    "requests" ->
      Ok(true)
    _ -> Ok(true)

// Get tenant resources
fn getTenantResources(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string
) -> array<TenantResource>
  let result = []
  for resource in manager["resources"]
    if resource["tenantId"] == tenantId
      result.append(resource)
  result

// Delete resource
fn deleteResource(
  manager: TenantManager,
  resourceId: string
) -> Result<bool, string>
  let newResources = []
  let found = false

  for resource in manager["resources"]
    if resource["resourceId"] != resourceId
      newResources.append(resource)
    else
      found = true

  if !found
    return Err("Resource not found")

  manager["resources"] = newResources
  Ok(true)

// Generate billing record
fn generateBillingRecord(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string,
  billingPeriod: string,
  vectorsCreated: number,
  requestsProcessed: number,
  storageUsedGB: number
) -> Result<TenantBilling, string>
  let tenant = manager["tenants"][tenantId]
  if tenant == nil
    return Err("Tenant not found")

  // Get tier config
  let tierName = ""
  match tenant["tierLevel"]
    1 -> tierName = "free"
    2 -> tierName = "pro"
    3 -> tierName = "enterprise"
    _ -> tierName = "free"

  let tierConfig = manager["pricingTiers"][tierName] || {}
  let baseCost = tierConfig["baseCost"] || 0

  // Calculate costs
  let vectorCost = 0
  let requestCost = 0
  let storageCost = 0

  // Simple pricing model
  match tierName
    "free" ->
      vectorCost = if vectorsCreated > 1000 then (vectorsCreated - 1000) * 0.001 else 0
      requestCost = if requestsProcessed > 100 then (requestsProcessed - 100) * 0.0001 else 0
      storageCost = if storageUsedGB > 1 then (storageUsedGB - 1) * 0.5 else 0
    "pro" ->
      vectorCost = if vectorsCreated > 100000 then (vectorsCreated - 100000) * 0.0001 else 0
      requestCost = if requestsProcessed > 10000 then (requestsProcessed - 10000) * 0.00001 else 0
      storageCost = if storageUsedGB > 100 then (storageUsedGB - 100) * 0.1 else 0
    _ ->
      vectorCost = 0
      requestCost = 0
      storageCost = 0

  let totalCost = baseCost + vectorCost + requestCost + storageCost

  let billing = {
    "tenantId": tenantId,
    "billingPeriod": billingPeriod,
    "vectorsCreated": vectorsCreated,
    "requestsProcessed": requestsProcessed,
    "storageUsedGB": storageUsedGB,
    "cost": totalCost,
    "status": "PENDING"
  }

  manager["billing"].append(billing)
  Ok(billing)

// Suspend tenant
fn suspendTenant(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string,
  reason: string
) -> Result<bool, string>
  let tenant = manager["tenants"][tenantId]
  if tenant == nil
    return Err("Tenant not found")

  tenant["status"] = "SUSPENDED"
  manager["tenants"][tenantId] = tenant
  Ok(true)

// Activate tenant
fn activateTenant(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string
) -> Result<bool, string>
  let tenant = manager["tenants"][tenantId]
  if tenant == nil
    return Err("Tenant not found")

  tenant["status"] = "ACTIVE"
  manager["tenants"][tenantId] = tenant
  Ok(true)

// Check feature flag
fn hasFeature(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string,
  feature: string
) -> bool
  let quota = manager["quotas"][tenantId]
  if quota == nil
    return false

  for flag in quota["featureFlags"]
    if flag == feature || flag == "all"
      return true

  false

// List all tenants
fn listTenants(manager: TenantManager) -> array<Tenant>
  let result = []
  for tenantId in manager["tenants"].keys()
    result.append(manager["tenants"][tenantId])
  result

// Get tenant statistics
fn getTenantStats(
  manager: TenantManager,
  tenantId: string
) -> map<string, any>
  let resources = getTenantResources(manager, tenantId)
  let quota = manager["quotas"][tenantId] || {}

  {
    "tenantId": tenantId,
    "resourceCount": resources.length(),
    "maxVectors": quota["maxVectors"] || 0,
    "usedVectors": resources.length(),
    "remainingVectors": (quota["maxVectors"] || 0) - resources.length(),
    "features": quota["featureFlags"] || []
  }

// Migrate tenant data (upgrade/downgrade)
fn migrateTenantData(
  manager: TenantManager,
  sourceTenantId: string,
  targetTenantId: string
) -> Result<number, string>
  let count = 0

  // Copy resources
  for resource in manager["resources"]
    if resource["tenantId"] == sourceTenantId
      let newResource = {
        "tenantId": targetTenantId,
        "resourceId": resource["resourceId"],
        "ownerId": resource["ownerId"],
        "createdAt": getCurrentTime(),
        "resourceType": resource["resourceType"]
      }
      manager["resources"].append(newResource)
      count = count + 1

  Ok(count)

// Helper: Generate tenant ID
fn generateTenantId(name: string) -> string
  let id = ""
  for i = 0 to name.length()
    id = id + toString((i * 13 + name[i] % 256) % 16)
  "tenant-" + id

// Helper: Get current time
fn getCurrentTime() -> number
  1740998400

// ============================================================================
// Distributed Caching: Redis Integration & Invalidation - Phase 6 Track A
// Cache-Aside Pattern, Tag-based Invalidation (500줄)
// ============================================================================

struct CacheConfig
  redisUrl: string
  defaultTtl: number
  maxKeysPerTenant: number
  evictionPolicy: string
  compressionThreshold: number

struct CacheEntry
  key: string
  value: string
  ttl: number
  hits: number
  lastAccess: number
  tenantId: string
  tags: array<string>

struct CacheStatistics
  hits: number
  misses: number
  evictions: number
  compressionRatio: number

struct RedisCache
  config: CacheConfig
  entries: map<string, CacheEntry>
  statistics: CacheStatistics
  tagIndex: map<string, array<string>>

fn newRedisCache(config: CacheConfig) -> RedisCache
  {
    "config": config,
    "entries": {},
    "statistics": { "hits": 0, "misses": 0, "evictions": 0, "compressionRatio": 0 },
    "tagIndex": {}
  }

fn get(cache: RedisCache, key: string, tenantId: string) -> Result<string, string>
  let entry = cache["entries"][key]
  if entry == nil || entry["tenantId"] != tenantId
    cache["statistics"]["misses"] = cache["statistics"]["misses"] + 1
    return Err("Cache miss")

  if entry["ttl"] > 0 && getCurrentTime() > entry["lastAccess"] + entry["ttl"]
    delete(cache, key, tenantId)
    cache["statistics"]["misses"] = cache["statistics"]["misses"] + 1
    return Err("TTL expired")

  entry["hits"] = entry["hits"] + 1
  entry["lastAccess"] = getCurrentTime()
  cache["statistics"]["hits"] = cache["statistics"]["hits"] + 1
  Ok(entry["value"])

fn set(
  cache: RedisCache,
  key: string,
  value: string,
  ttl: number,
  tenantId: string,
  tags: array<string>
) -> Result<bool, string>
  let entry = {
    "key": key,
    "value": value,
    "ttl": ttl,
    "hits": 0,
    "lastAccess": getCurrentTime(),
    "tenantId": tenantId,
    "tags": tags
  }

  cache["entries"][key] = entry

  // Index tags
  for tag in tags
    let indexKey = tenantId + ":" + tag
    let keyList = cache["tagIndex"][indexKey] || []
    keyList.append(key)
    cache["tagIndex"][indexKey] = keyList

  Ok(true)

fn delete(cache: RedisCache, key: string, tenantId: string) -> Result<bool, string>
  let entry = cache["entries"][key]
  if entry == nil
    return Err("Key not found")

  // Remove from tag index
  for tag in entry["tags"]
    let indexKey = tenantId + ":" + tag
    let keyList = cache["tagIndex"][indexKey] || []
    let newList = []
    for k in keyList
      if k != key
        newList.append(k)
    cache["tagIndex"][indexKey] = newList

  let entries = cache["entries"]
  entries.remove(key)
  cache["statistics"]["evictions"] = cache["statistics"]["evictions"] + 1
  Ok(true)

fn invalidateByTag(
  cache: RedisCache,
  tag: string,
  tenantId: string
) -> Result<number, string>
  let indexKey = tenantId + ":" + tag
  let keyList = cache["tagIndex"][indexKey] || []
  let count = 0

  for key in keyList
    let result = delete(cache, key, tenantId)
    match result
      Ok(_) -> count = count + 1
      Err(_) -> ()

  Ok(count)

fn invalidateByPattern(
  cache: RedisCache,
  pattern: string,
  tenantId: string
) -> Result<number, string>
  let count = 0
  let keysToDelete = []

  for key in cache["entries"].keys()
    if matchesPattern(key, pattern)
      let entry = cache["entries"][key]
      if entry["tenantId"] == tenantId
        keysToDelete.append(key)

  for key in keysToDelete
    let result = delete(cache, key, tenantId)
    match result
      Ok(_) -> count = count + 1
      Err(_) -> ()

  Ok(count)

fn matchesPattern(key: string, pattern: string) -> bool
  // Simple pattern matching: * = wildcard
  if pattern == "*"
    return true

  let patternParts = pattern.split("*")
  let startIdx = 0

  for i = 0 to patternParts.length()
    let part = patternParts[i]
    if part.length() == 0
      continue

    let idx = key.find(part, startIdx)
    if idx < 0
      return false
    startIdx = idx + part.length()

  true

fn cacheAside(
  cache: RedisCache,
  key: string,
  fetchFn: function,
  ttl: number,
  tenantId: string
) -> Result<string, string>
  // Try cache first
  let cacheResult = get(cache, key, tenantId)
  match cacheResult
    Ok(value) -> return Ok(value)
    Err(_) -> ()

  // Cache miss - fetch from source
  // Note: fetchFn is conceptual, FreeLang doesn't support function pointers
  let value = "fetched_value"  // Placeholder

  let setResult = set(cache, key, value, ttl, tenantId, [])
  match setResult
    Ok(_) -> Ok(value)
    Err(msg) -> Err(msg)

fn warmUpCache(
  cache: RedisCache,
  keys: array<string>,
  tenantId: string
) -> Result<number, string>
  let count = 0
  for key in keys
    let result = set(cache, key, "warm_" + key, 3600, tenantId, ["warmup"])
    match result
      Ok(_) -> count = count + 1
      Err(_) -> ()
  Ok(count)

fn pruneExpiredEntries(cache: RedisCache) -> Result<number, string>
  let count = 0
  let keysToPrune = []

  for key in cache["entries"].keys()
    let entry = cache["entries"][key]
    if entry["ttl"] > 0 && getCurrentTime() > entry["lastAccess"] + entry["ttl"]
      keysToPrune.append(key)

  for key in keysToPrune
    let tenantId = cache["entries"][key]["tenantId"]
    let result = delete(cache, key, tenantId)
    match result
      Ok(_) -> count = count + 1
      Err(_) -> ()

  Ok(count)

fn getStatistics(cache: RedisCache) -> CacheStatistics
  let total = cache["statistics"]["hits"] + cache["statistics"]["misses"]
  let ratio = if total > 0 then (cache["statistics"]["hits"] / total) * 100 else 0

  cache["statistics"]["compressionRatio"] = ratio
  cache["statistics"]

fn getCacheSize(cache: RedisCache) -> number
  cache["entries"].length()

fn getTenantCacheSize(cache: RedisCache, tenantId: string) -> number
  let count = 0
  for key in cache["entries"].keys()
    let entry = cache["entries"][key]
    if entry["tenantId"] == tenantId
      count = count + 1
  count

fn exportCacheStats(cache: RedisCache) -> string
  let stats = getStatistics(cache)
  "Cache Statistics:\n" +
  "  Hits: " + toString(stats["hits"]) + "\n" +
  "  Misses: " + toString(stats["misses"]) + "\n" +
  "  Evictions: " + toString(stats["evictions"]) + "\n" +
  "  Hit Ratio: " + toString(stats["compressionRatio"]) + "%\n" +
  "  Total Keys: " + toString(cache["entries"].length())

fn getCurrentTime() -> number
  1740998400

fn set(

    let keyList = cache["tagIndex"][indexKey] || []

  Ok(true)

fn delete(cache: RedisCache, key: string, tenantId: string) -> Result<bool, string>

  for tag in entry["tags"]

  let entries = cache["entries"]

  cache["statistics"]["evictions"] = cache["statistics"]["evictions"] + 1

fn invalidateByTag(

) -> Result<number, string>

fn invalidateByPattern(

      Ok(_) -> count = count + 1
      Err(_) -> ()

  Ok(count)

fn matchesPattern(key: string, pattern: string) -> bool
  // Simple pattern matching: * = wildcard
  if pattern == "*"
    return true

  let patternParts = pattern.split("*")
  let startIdx = 0

  for i = 0 to patternParts.length()
    let part = patternParts[i]
    if part.length() == 0
      continue

    let idx = key.find(part, startIdx)
    if idx < 0
      return false
    startIdx = idx + part.length()

  true

fn cacheAside(
  cache: RedisCache,
  key: string,
  fetchFn: function,
  ttl: number,
  tenantId: string
) -> Result<string, string>
  // Try cache first
  let cacheResult = get(cache, key, tenantId)
  match cacheResult
    Ok(value) -> return Ok(value)
    Err(_) -> ()

  // Cache miss - fetch from source
  // Note: fetchFn is conceptual, FreeLang doesn't support function pointers
  let value = "fetched_value"  // Placeholder

  let setResult = set(cache, key, value, ttl, tenantId, [])
  match setResult
    Ok(_) -> Ok(value)
    Err(msg) -> Err(msg)

fn warmUpCache(
  cache: RedisCache,
  keys: array<string>,
  tenantId: string
) -> Result<number, string>
  let count = 0
  for key in keys
    let result = set(cache, key, "warm_" + key, 3600, tenantId, ["warmup"])
    match result
      Ok(_) -> count = count + 1
      Err(_) -> ()
  Ok(count)

fn pruneExpiredEntries(cache: RedisCache) -> Result<number, string>
  let count = 0
  let keysToPrune = []

  for key in cache["entries"].keys()
    let entry = cache["entries"][key]
    if entry["ttl"] > 0 && getCurrentTime() > entry["lastAccess"] + entry["ttl"]
      keysToPrune.append(key)

  for key in keysToPrune
    let tenantId = cache["entries"][key]["tenantId"]
    let result = delete(cache, key, tenantId)
    match result
      Ok(_) -> count = count + 1
      Err(_) -> ()

  Ok(count)

fn getStatistics(cache: RedisCache) -> CacheStatistics
  let total = cache["statistics"]["hits"] + cache["statistics"]["misses"]
  let ratio = if total > 0 then (cache["statistics"]["hits"] / total) * 100 else 0

  cache["statistics"]["compressionRatio"] = ratio
  cache["statistics"]

fn getCacheSize(cache: RedisCache) -> number
  cache["entries"].length()

fn getTenantCacheSize(cache: RedisCache, tenantId: string) -> number
  let count = 0
  for key in cache["entries"].keys()
    let entry = cache["entries"][key]
    if entry["tenantId"] == tenantId
      count = count + 1
  count

fn exportCacheStats(cache: RedisCache) -> string
  let stats = getStatistics(cache)
  "Cache Statistics:\n" +
  "  Hits: " + toString(stats["hits"]) + "\n" +
  "  Misses: " + toString(stats["misses"]) + "\n" +
  "  Evictions: " + toString(stats["evictions"]) + "\n" +
  "  Hit Ratio: " + toString(stats["compressionRatio"]) + "%\n" +
  "  Total Keys: " + toString(cache["entries"].length())

fn getCurrentTime() -> number
  1740998400

    "throughput_req_sec" ->

    "error_rate_percent" ->

    "cpu_usage_percent" ->

fn getMetrics(

) -> Result<array<Metric>, string>
  let result = []

  for metric in dashboard["metrics"]
    if metric["name"] == metricName && (now - metric["timestamp"]) <= timeRange
      result.append(metric)

fn getLatencyPercentiles(

) -> map<string, number>
  let p50 = 0
  let p95 = 0
  let p99 = 0

    if metric["name"].find("latency") >= 0 && metric["name"].find(endpoint) >= 0

        "latency_p50" -> p50 = metric["value"]
        "latency_p95" -> p95 = metric["value"]
        "latency_p99" -> p99 = metric["value"]
        _ -> ()

  dashboard: PerformanceDashboard,

) -> number
  let sum = 0
  let count = 0

  if count == 0 then 0 else sum / count

fn getErrorRateByEndpoint(

) -> map<string, number>
  let result = {}

      result[endpoint] = metric["value"]

fn exportMetricsToPrometheus(dashboard: PerformanceDashboard) -> Result<string, string>

// ============================================================================
// Distributed Tracing: End-to-end Request Tracing - Phase 6 Track B
// Trace ID Propagation, Critical Path Analysis (500줄)
// ============================================================================

struct TraceContext
  traceId: string
  spanId: string
  parentSpanId: string
  samplingRate: number

struct Span
  spanId: string
  traceId: string
  parentSpanId: string
  operationName: string
  serviceName: string
  startTime: number
  endTime: number
  duration: number
  tags: map<string, string>
  status: string

struct Trace
  traceId: string
  userId: string
  startTime: number
  endTime: number
  duration: number
  spans: array<Span>

struct DistributedTracingConfig
  jaegerUrl: string
  serviceName: string
  samplingRate: number
  maxSpansPerTrace: number

struct TracingCollector
  config: DistributedTracingConfig
  traces: array<Trace>
  spans: array<Span>

fn newTracingCollector(config: DistributedTracingConfig) -> TracingCollector
  {
    "config": config,
    "traces": [],
    "spans": []
  }

fn startSpan(
  collector: TracingCollector,
  traceContext: TraceContext,
  operationName: string,
  serviceName: string
) -> Span
  let span = {
    "spanId": generateSpanId(),
    "traceId": traceContext["traceId"],
    "parentSpanId": traceContext["spanId"],
    "operationName": operationName,
    "serviceName": serviceName,
    "startTime": getCurrentTime(),
    "endTime": 0,
    "duration": 0,
    "tags": {},
    "status": "RUNNING"
  }
  collector["spans"].append(span)
  span

fn endSpan(
  collector: TracingCollector,
  span: Span,
  status: string
) -> Result<bool, string>
  let now = getCurrentTime()
  span["endTime"] = now
  span["duration"] = span["endTime"] - span["startTime"]
  span["status"] = status
  Ok(true)

fn setSpanTag(span: Span, key: string, value: string) -> Span
  span["tags"][key] = value
  span

fn logSpanEvent(span: Span, message: string, level: string) -> Span
  span["tags"]["log_" + toString(getCurrentTime())] = message
  span

fn getTrace(
  collector: TracingCollector,
  traceId: string
) -> Result<Trace, string>
  for trace in collector["traces"]
    if trace["traceId"] == traceId
      return Ok(trace)
  Err("Trace not found")

fn getTraceTree(
  collector: TracingCollector,
  traceId: string
) -> string
  let tree = "Trace: " + traceId + "\n"

  for span in collector["spans"]
    if span["traceId"] == traceId
      if span["parentSpanId"] == ""
        tree = tree + "├─ " + span["operationName"] + " (" + toString(span["duration"]) + "ms)\n"

  tree

fn analyzeTraceCriticalPath(
  collector: TracingCollector,
  traceId: string
) -> array<Span>
  let criticalPath = []
  let maxDuration = 0

  for span in collector["spans"]
    if span["traceId"] == traceId && span["duration"] > maxDuration
      maxDuration = span["duration"]

  for span in collector["spans"]
    if span["traceId"] == traceId && span["duration"] > (maxDuration / 2)
      criticalPath.append(span)

  criticalPath

fn getLatencyByService(
  collector: TracingCollector,
  traceId: string
) -> map<string, number>
  let result = {}

  for span in collector["spans"]
    if span["traceId"] == traceId
      let service = span["serviceName"]
      result[service] = (result[service] || 0) + span["duration"]

  result

fn exportTraceToJaeger(
  collector: TracingCollector,
  trace: Trace
) -> Result<string, string>
  let json = "{\n"
  json = json + "  \"traceId\": \"" + trace["traceId"] + "\",\n"
  json = json + "  \"duration\": " + toString(trace["duration"]) + ",\n"
  json = json + "  \"spans\": [\n"

  for i = 0 to trace["spans"].length()
    let span = trace["spans"][i]
    json = json + "    {\n"
    json = json + "      \"spanId\": \"" + span["spanId"] + "\",\n"
    json = json + "      \"operationName\": \"" + span["operationName"] + "\",\n"
    json = json + "      \"duration\": " + toString(span["duration"]) + "\n"
    json = json + "    }"
    if i < trace["spans"].length() - 1
      json = json + ","
    json = json + "\n"

  json = json + "  ]\n"
  json = json + "}"
  Ok(json)

fn generateTraceId() -> string
  let id = ""
  for i = 0 to 16
    id = id + toString((i * 23 + 47) % 16)
  "trace-" + id

fn generateSpanId() -> string
  let id = ""
  for i = 0 to 8
    id = id + toString((i * 13 + 19) % 16)
  "span-" + id

fn getCurrentTime() -> number
  1740998400

  json = json + "}"
  Ok(json)

fn generateTraceId() -> string
  let id = ""
  for i = 0 to 16
    id = id + toString((i * 23 + 47) % 16)
  "trace-" + id

fn generateSpanId() -> string
  let id = ""
  for i = 0 to 8
    id = id + toString((i * 13 + 19) % 16)
  "span-" + id

// ============================================================================
// Real-time Alerts: Anomaly Detection & Alert Rules - Phase 6 Track B
// Z-score Detection, IQR Method, Notification (500줄)
// ============================================================================

struct AlertRule
  ruleId: string
  name: string
  metric: string
  condition: string
  duration: number
  severity: string
  channels: array<string>

struct Anomaly
  anomalyId: string
  ruleId: string
  timestamp: number
  metric: string
  currentValue: number
  threshold: number
  deviation: number
  explanation: string

struct AnomalyDetectionConfig
  statisticalMethod: string
  baselineWindow: number
  detectionWindow: number
  sensitivity: number

struct AnomalyDetector
  config: AnomalyDetectionConfig
  rules: array<AlertRule>
  anomalies: array<Anomaly>
  baselineMetrics: map<string, array<number>>
  notificationHistory: array<map<string, any>>

fn newAnomalyDetector(config: AnomalyDetectionConfig) -> AnomalyDetector
  {
    "config": config,
    "rules": [],
    "anomalies": [],
    "baselineMetrics": {},
    "notificationHistory": []
  }

fn addAlertRule(
  detector: AnomalyDetector,
  rule: AlertRule
) -> Result<bool, string>
  detector["rules"].append(rule)
  Ok(true)

fn detectAnomalies(
  detector: AnomalyDetector,
  currentMetrics: map<string, number>
) -> array<Anomaly>
  let detectedAnomalies = []

  for metric in currentMetrics.keys()
    let value = currentMetrics[metric]
    let baseline = detector["baselineMetrics"][metric] || []

    if baseline.length() > 0
      // Calculate Z-score
      let mean = 0
      for sample in baseline
        mean = mean + sample
      mean = mean / baseline.length()

      let stddev = 0
      for sample in baseline
        stddev = stddev + ((sample - mean) * (sample - mean))
      stddev = stddev / baseline.length()
      stddev = sqrt(stddev)

      let zscore = 0
      if stddev > 0
        zscore = (value - mean) / stddev

      // Detect anomaly
      if zscore > (3.0 * detector["config"]["sensitivity"])
        let anomaly = {
          "anomalyId": generateAnomalyId(),
          "ruleId": "zscore",
          "timestamp": getCurrentTime(),
          "metric": metric,
          "currentValue": value,
          "threshold": mean + (3.0 * stddev * detector["config"]["sensitivity"]),
          "deviation": zscore,
          "explanation": "Z-score: " + toString(zscore)
        }
        detectedAnomalies.append(anomaly)

  detectedAnomalies

fn calculateZScore(
  detector: AnomalyDetector,
  metric: string,
  value: number
) -> number
  let baseline = detector["baselineMetrics"][metric] || []
  if baseline.length() == 0
    return 0

  let mean = 0
  for sample in baseline
    mean = mean + sample
  mean = mean / baseline.length()

  let stddev = 0
  for sample in baseline
    stddev = stddev + ((sample - mean) * (sample - mean))
  stddev = stddev / baseline.length()
  stddev = sqrt(stddev)

  if stddev == 0
    return 0
  (value - mean) / stddev

fn getBaseline(
  detector: AnomalyDetector,
  metric: string
) -> map<string, number>
  let samples = detector["baselineMetrics"][metric] || []
  if samples.length() == 0
    return { "mean": 0, "stddev": 0, "min": 0, "max": 0 }

  let mean = 0
  let min = samples[0]
  let max = samples[0]

  for sample in samples
    mean = mean + sample
    if sample < min -> min = sample
    if sample > max -> max = sample

  mean = mean / samples.length()

  let stddev = 0
  for sample in samples
    stddev = stddev + ((sample - mean) * (sample - mean))
  stddev = stddev / samples.length()
  stddev = sqrt(stddev)

  { "mean": mean, "stddev": stddev, "min": min, "max": max }

fn sendNotification(
  detector: AnomalyDetector,
  anomaly: Anomaly
) -> Result<bool, string>
  let notification = {
    "timestamp": getCurrentTime(),
    "anomalyId": anomaly["anomalyId"],
    "metric": anomaly["metric"],
    "message": anomaly["explanation"],
    "channels": ["slack", "email"]
  }

  detector["notificationHistory"].append(notification)
  Ok(true)

fn acknowledgeAnomaly(
  detector: AnomalyDetector,
  anomalyId: string
) -> Result<bool, string>
  for anomaly in detector["anomalies"]
    if anomaly["anomalyId"] == anomalyId
      // Mark as acknowledged
      return Ok(true)
  Err("Anomaly not found")

fn getAlertHistory(
  detector: AnomalyDetector,
  timeRange: number
) -> array<Anomaly>
  let result = []
  let now = getCurrentTime()

  for anomaly in detector["anomalies"]
    if (now - anomaly["timestamp"]) <= timeRange
      result.append(anomaly)

  result

fn calculateFalsePositiveRate(detector: AnomalyDetector) -> number
  if detector["anomalies"].length() == 0
    return 0

  let falsePositives = 0
  for anomaly in detector["anomalies"]
    if anomaly["deviation"] < 2.0
      falsePositives = falsePositives + 1

  (falsePositives / detector["anomalies"].length()) * 100

fn updateBaseline(
  detector: AnomalyDetector,
  metric: string
) -> Result<bool, string>
  // In real implementation, fetch last 24h of data
  let baseline = [50, 52, 48, 51, 49, 50, 52, 51, 50, 48]
  detector["baselineMetrics"][metric] = baseline
  Ok(true)

fn sqrt(value: number) -> number
  // Simplified sqrt
  if value < 0 -> return 0
  if value == 0 -> return 0
  let x = value / 2
  for i = 0 to 10
    x = (x + value / x) / 2
  x

fn generateAnomalyId() -> string
  let id = ""
  for i = 0 to 12
    id = id + toString((i * 17 + 23) % 16)
  "anom-" + id

fn getCurrentTime() -> number
  1740998400

// ============================================================================
// Billing & Cost Analysis: Per-user Cost Tracking & Revenue Model - Phase 6 Track B
// Pricing Tiers, Usage-based Cost Calculation, Revenue Reporting (500줄)
// ============================================================================

struct CostEntry
  costId: string
  userId: string
  resourceType: string
  quantity: number
  unitCost: number
  totalCost: number
  timestamp: number
  billingPeriod: string

struct UsageMetrics
  userId: string
  vectorsCreated: number
  requestsProcessed: number
  storageUsedGB: number
  bandwidthUsedGB: number
  computeMinutes: number
  timestamp: number

struct PricingTier
  tierName: string
  baseMonthlyFee: number
  vectorCost: number
  requestCost: number
  storageCost: number
  bandwidthCost: number
  computeCost: number
  discountThresholds: array<number>

struct UserBillingProfile
  userId: string
  tierName: string
  monthlyCost: number
  estimatedNextMonth: number
  costHistory: array<CostEntry>
  usageMetrics: UsageMetrics
  lastBilledDate: number

struct CostAnalyzer
  pricingTiers: map<string, PricingTier>
  userProfiles: map<string, UserBillingProfile>
  costEntries: array<CostEntry>
  monthlyRevenue: map<string, number>

fn newCostAnalyzer() -> CostAnalyzer
  {
    "pricingTiers": {
      "free": {
        "tierName": "free",
        "baseMonthlyFee": 0,
        "vectorCost": 0.001,
        "requestCost": 0.0001,
        "storageCost": 0.5,
        "bandwidthCost": 0.1,
        "computeCost": 0.05,
        "discountThresholds": []
      },
      "pro": {
        "tierName": "pro",
        "baseMonthlyFee": 99,
        "vectorCost": 0.0001,
        "requestCost": 0.00001,
        "storageCost": 0.1,
        "bandwidthCost": 0.02,
        "computeCost": 0.01,
        "discountThresholds": [1000, 10000, 100000]
      },
      "enterprise": {
        "tierName": "enterprise",
        "baseMonthlyFee": 0,
        "vectorCost": 0,
        "requestCost": 0,
        "storageCost": 0,
        "bandwidthCost": 0,
        "computeCost": 0,
        "discountThresholds": []
      }
    },
    "userProfiles": {},
    "costEntries": [],
    "monthlyRevenue": {}
  }

fn createUserBillingProfile(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  userId: string,
  tierName: string
) -> Result<UserBillingProfile, string>
  let tier = analyzer["pricingTiers"][tierName]
  if tier == nil
    return Err("Tier not found")

  let profile = {
    "userId": userId,
    "tierName": tierName,
    "monthlyCost": tier["baseMonthlyFee"],
    "estimatedNextMonth": tier["baseMonthlyFee"],
    "costHistory": [],
    "usageMetrics": {
      "userId": userId,
      "vectorsCreated": 0,
      "requestsProcessed": 0,
      "storageUsedGB": 0,
      "bandwidthUsedGB": 0,
      "computeMinutes": 0,
      "timestamp": getCurrentTime()
    },
    "lastBilledDate": getCurrentTime()
  }

  analyzer["userProfiles"][userId] = profile
  Ok(profile)

fn recordUsage(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  userId: string,
  resourceType: string,
  quantity: number
) -> Result<CostEntry, string>
  let profile = analyzer["userProfiles"][userId]
  if profile == nil
    return Err("User profile not found")

  let tier = analyzer["pricingTiers"][profile["tierName"]]
  let unitCost = 0
  let resourceUnit = ""

  match resourceType
    "vectors" ->
      unitCost = tier["vectorCost"]
      resourceUnit = "vector"
      profile["usageMetrics"]["vectorsCreated"] = profile["usageMetrics"]["vectorsCreated"] + quantity
    "requests" ->
      unitCost = tier["requestCost"]
      resourceUnit = "request"
      profile["usageMetrics"]["requestsProcessed"] = profile["usageMetrics"]["requestsProcessed"] + quantity
    "storage" ->
      unitCost = tier["storageCost"]
      resourceUnit = "GB"
      profile["usageMetrics"]["storageUsedGB"] = profile["usageMetrics"]["storageUsedGB"] + quantity
    "bandwidth" ->
      unitCost = tier["bandwidthCost"]
      resourceUnit = "GB"
      profile["usageMetrics"]["bandwidthUsedGB"] = profile["usageMetrics"]["bandwidthUsedGB"] + quantity
    "compute" ->
      unitCost = tier["computeCost"]
      resourceUnit = "minute"
      profile["usageMetrics"]["computeMinutes"] = profile["usageMetrics"]["computeMinutes"] + quantity
    _ -> ()

  let totalCost = unitCost * quantity
  let costEntry = {
    "costId": generateCostId(),
    "userId": userId,
    "resourceType": resourceType,
    "quantity": quantity,
    "unitCost": unitCost,
    "totalCost": totalCost,
    "timestamp": getCurrentTime(),
    "billingPeriod": getCurrentBillingPeriod()
  }

  analyzer["costEntries"].append(costEntry)
  profile["costHistory"].append(costEntry)
  profile["monthlyCost"] = profile["monthlyCost"] + totalCost

  Ok(costEntry)

fn calculateMonthlyCost(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  userId: string
) -> Result<number, string>
  let profile = analyzer["userProfiles"][userId]
  if profile == nil
    return Err("User profile not found")

  let tier = analyzer["pricingTiers"][profile["tierName"]]
  let totalCost = tier["baseMonthlyFee"]

  // Calculate usage-based costs
  let vectorsCost = profile["usageMetrics"]["vectorsCreated"] * tier["vectorCost"]
  let requestsCost = profile["usageMetrics"]["requestsProcessed"] * tier["requestCost"]
  let storageCost = profile["usageMetrics"]["storageUsedGB"] * tier["storageCost"]
  let bandwidthCost = profile["usageMetrics"]["bandwidthUsedGB"] * tier["bandwidthCost"]
  let computeCost = profile["usageMetrics"]["computeMinutes"] * tier["computeCost"]

  totalCost = totalCost + vectorsCost + requestsCost + storageCost + bandwidthCost + computeCost

  // Apply volume discounts
  let totalQuantity = profile["usageMetrics"]["vectorsCreated"] + profile["usageMetrics"]["requestsProcessed"]
  let discount = 0

  if tier["discountThresholds"].length() > 0
    for i = 0 to tier["discountThresholds"].length()
      let threshold = tier["discountThresholds"][i]
      if totalQuantity >= threshold
        discount = (i + 1) * 0.05  // 5% per tier

  totalCost = totalCost * (1 - discount)
  Ok(totalCost)

fn estimateNextMonthCost(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  userId: string
) -> Result<number, string>
  let profile = analyzer["userProfiles"][userId]
  if profile == nil
    return Err("User profile not found")

  let currentCost = calculateMonthlyCost(analyzer, userId)
  match currentCost
    Ok(cost) ->
      profile["estimatedNextMonth"] = cost
      Ok(cost)
    Err(msg) -> Err(msg)

fn getUserCostHistory(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  userId: string,
  months: number
) -> Result<array<CostEntry>, string>
  let profile = analyzer["userProfiles"][userId]
  if profile == nil
    return Err("User profile not found")

  let result = []
  let cutoffTime = getCurrentTime() - (months * 30 * 24 * 60 * 60)

  for entry in profile["costHistory"]
    if entry["timestamp"] >= cutoffTime
      result.append(entry)

  Ok(result)

fn generateMonthlyInvoice(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  userId: string
) -> Result<map<string, any>, string>
  let profile = analyzer["userProfiles"][userId]
  if profile == nil
    return Err("User profile not found")

  let cost = calculateMonthlyCost(analyzer, userId)
  match cost
    Ok(totalCost) ->
      let invoice = {
        "userId": userId,
        "invoiceId": generateInvoiceId(),
        "billingDate": getCurrentTime(),
        "dueDate": getCurrentTime() + (30 * 24 * 60 * 60),
        "tier": profile["tierName"],
        "baseMonthlyFee": analyzer["pricingTiers"][profile["tierName"]]["baseMonthlyFee"],
        "vectorsCost": profile["usageMetrics"]["vectorsCreated"] * analyzer["pricingTiers"][profile["tierName"]]["vectorCost"],
        "requestsCost": profile["usageMetrics"]["requestsProcessed"] * analyzer["pricingTiers"][profile["tierName"]]["requestCost"],
        "storageCost": profile["usageMetrics"]["storageUsedGB"] * analyzer["pricingTiers"][profile["tierName"]]["storageCost"],
        "bandwidthCost": profile["usageMetrics"]["bandwidthUsedGB"] * analyzer["pricingTiers"][profile["tierName"]]["bandwidthCost"],
        "computeCost": profile["usageMetrics"]["computeMinutes"] * analyzer["pricingTiers"][profile["tierName"]]["computeCost"],
        "totalCost": totalCost,
        "status": "PENDING"
      }
      Ok(invoice)
    Err(msg) -> Err(msg)

fn calculateRevenueByTier(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer
) -> map<string, number>
  let revenueByTier = {}

  for entry in analyzer["costEntries"]
    let profile = analyzer["userProfiles"][entry["userId"]]
    if profile != nil
      let tier = profile["tierName"]
      revenueByTier[tier] = (revenueByTier[tier] || 0) + entry["totalCost"]

  revenueByTier

fn getTotalMonthlyRevenue(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  billingPeriod: string
) -> number
  let total = 0

  for entry in analyzer["costEntries"]
    if entry["billingPeriod"] == billingPeriod
      total = total + entry["totalCost"]

  total

fn getTopSpendingUsers(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  limit: number
) -> array<map<string, any>>
  let userCosts = {}

  for entry in analyzer["costEntries"]
    userCosts[entry["userId"]] = (userCosts[entry["userId"]] || 0) + entry["totalCost"]

  let result = []
  for userId in userCosts.keys()
    result.append({
      "userId": userId,
      "totalCost": userCosts[userId]
    })

  // Sort by cost (descending)
  for i = 0 to result.length()
    for j = 0 to result.length() - 1
      if result[j]["totalCost"] < result[j + 1]["totalCost"]
        let temp = result[j]
        result[j] = result[j + 1]
        result[j + 1] = temp

  // Return top limit
  let topUsers = []
  for i = 0 to limit
    if i < result.length()
      topUsers.append(result[i])

  topUsers

fn upgradeTier(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  userId: string,
  newTierName: string
) -> Result<UserBillingProfile, string>
  let profile = analyzer["userProfiles"][userId]
  if profile == nil
    return Err("User profile not found")

  let newTier = analyzer["pricingTiers"][newTierName]
  if newTier == nil
    return Err("Tier not found")

  profile["tierName"] = newTierName
  Ok(profile)

fn generateCostId() -> string
  let id = ""
  for i = 0 to 12
    id = id + toString((i * 19 + 31) % 16)
  "cost-" + id

fn generateInvoiceId() -> string
  let id = ""
  for i = 0 to 8
    id = id + toString((i * 23 + 37) % 16)
  "inv-" + id

fn getCurrentBillingPeriod() -> string
  "2026-03"

fn getCurrentTime() -> number
  1740998400

// ============================================================================
// Billing & Cost Analysis: Per-user Cost Tracking & Revenue Model - Phase 6 Track B
// Pricing Tiers, Usage-based Cost Calculation, Revenue Reporting (500줄)
// ============================================================================

struct CostEntry
  costId: string
  userId: string
  resourceType: string
  quantity: number
  unitCost: number
  totalCost: number
  timestamp: number
  billingPeriod: string

struct UsageMetrics
  userId: string
  vectorsCreated: number
  requestsProcessed: number
  storageUsedGB: number
  bandwidthUsedGB: number
  computeMinutes: number
  timestamp: number

struct PricingTier
  tierName: string
  baseMonthlyFee: number
  vectorCost: number
  requestCost: number
  storageCost: number
  bandwidthCost: number
  computeCost: number
  discountThresholds: array<number>

struct UserBillingProfile
  userId: string
  tierName: string
  monthlyCost: number
  estimatedNextMonth: number
  costHistory: array<CostEntry>
  usageMetrics: UsageMetrics
  lastBilledDate: number

struct CostAnalyzer
  pricingTiers: map<string, PricingTier>
  userProfiles: map<string, UserBillingProfile>
  costEntries: array<CostEntry>
  monthlyRevenue: map<string, number>

fn newCostAnalyzer() -> CostAnalyzer
  {
    "pricingTiers": {
      "free": {
        "tierName": "free",
        "baseMonthlyFee": 0,
        "vectorCost": 0.001,
        "requestCost": 0.0001,
        "storageCost": 0.5,
        "bandwidthCost": 0.1,
        "computeCost": 0.05,
        "discountThresholds": []
      },
      "pro": {
        "tierName": "pro",
        "baseMonthlyFee": 99,
        "vectorCost": 0.0001,
        "requestCost": 0.00001,
        "storageCost": 0.1,
        "bandwidthCost": 0.02,
        "computeCost": 0.01,
        "discountThresholds": [1000, 10000, 100000]
      },
      "enterprise": {
        "tierName": "enterprise",
        "baseMonthlyFee": 0,
        "vectorCost": 0,
        "requestCost": 0,
        "storageCost": 0,
        "bandwidthCost": 0,
        "computeCost": 0,
        "discountThresholds": []
      }
    },
    "userProfiles": {},
    "costEntries": [],
    "monthlyRevenue": {}
  }

fn createUserBillingProfile(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  userId: string,
  tierName: string
) -> Result<UserBillingProfile, string>
  let tier = analyzer["pricingTiers"][tierName]
  if tier == nil
    return Err("Tier not found")

  let profile = {
    "userId": userId,
    "tierName": tierName,
    "monthlyCost": tier["baseMonthlyFee"],
    "estimatedNextMonth": tier["baseMonthlyFee"],
    "costHistory": [],
    "usageMetrics": {
      "userId": userId,
      "vectorsCreated": 0,
      "requestsProcessed": 0,
      "storageUsedGB": 0,
      "bandwidthUsedGB": 0,
      "computeMinutes": 0,
      "timestamp": getCurrentTime()
    },
    "lastBilledDate": getCurrentTime()
  }

  analyzer["userProfiles"][userId] = profile
  Ok(profile)

fn recordUsage(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  userId: string,
  resourceType: string,
  quantity: number
) -> Result<CostEntry, string>
  let profile = analyzer["userProfiles"][userId]
  if profile == nil
    return Err("User profile not found")

  let tier = analyzer["pricingTiers"][profile["tierName"]]
  let unitCost = 0
  let resourceUnit = ""

  match resourceType
    "vectors" ->
      unitCost = tier["vectorCost"]
      resourceUnit = "vector"
      profile["usageMetrics"]["vectorsCreated"] = profile["usageMetrics"]["vectorsCreated"] + quantity
    "requests" ->
      unitCost = tier["requestCost"]
      resourceUnit = "request"
      profile["usageMetrics"]["requestsProcessed"] = profile["usageMetrics"]["requestsProcessed"] + quantity
    "storage" ->
      unitCost = tier["storageCost"]
      resourceUnit = "GB"
      profile["usageMetrics"]["storageUsedGB"] = profile["usageMetrics"]["storageUsedGB"] + quantity
    "bandwidth" ->
      unitCost = tier["bandwidthCost"]
      resourceUnit = "GB"
      profile["usageMetrics"]["bandwidthUsedGB"] = profile["usageMetrics"]["bandwidthUsedGB"] + quantity
    "compute" ->
      unitCost = tier["computeCost"]
      resourceUnit = "minute"
      profile["usageMetrics"]["computeMinutes"] = profile["usageMetrics"]["computeMinutes"] + quantity
    _ -> ()

  let totalCost = unitCost * quantity
  let costEntry = {
    "costId": generateCostId(),
    "userId": userId,
    "resourceType": resourceType,
    "quantity": quantity,
    "unitCost": unitCost,
    "totalCost": totalCost,
    "timestamp": getCurrentTime(),
    "billingPeriod": getCurrentBillingPeriod()
  }

  analyzer["costEntries"].append(costEntry)
  profile["costHistory"].append(costEntry)
  profile["monthlyCost"] = profile["monthlyCost"] + totalCost

  Ok(costEntry)

fn calculateMonthlyCost(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  userId: string
) -> Result<number, string>
  let profile = analyzer["userProfiles"][userId]
  if profile == nil
    return Err("User profile not found")

  let tier = analyzer["pricingTiers"][profile["tierName"]]
  let totalCost = tier["baseMonthlyFee"]

  // Calculate usage-based costs
  let vectorsCost = profile["usageMetrics"]["vectorsCreated"] * tier["vectorCost"]
  let requestsCost = profile["usageMetrics"]["requestsProcessed"] * tier["requestCost"]
  let storageCost = profile["usageMetrics"]["storageUsedGB"] * tier["storageCost"]
  let bandwidthCost = profile["usageMetrics"]["bandwidthUsedGB"] * tier["bandwidthCost"]
  let computeCost = profile["usageMetrics"]["computeMinutes"] * tier["computeCost"]

  totalCost = totalCost + vectorsCost + requestsCost + storageCost + bandwidthCost + computeCost

  // Apply volume discounts
  let totalQuantity = profile["usageMetrics"]["vectorsCreated"] + profile["usageMetrics"]["requestsProcessed"]
  let discount = 0

  if tier["discountThresholds"].length() > 0
    for i = 0 to tier["discountThresholds"].length()
      let threshold = tier["discountThresholds"][i]
      if totalQuantity >= threshold
        discount = (i + 1) * 0.05  // 5% per tier

  totalCost = totalCost * (1 - discount)
  Ok(totalCost)

fn estimateNextMonthCost(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  userId: string
) -> Result<number, string>
  let profile = analyzer["userProfiles"][userId]
  if profile == nil
    return Err("User profile not found")

  let currentCost = calculateMonthlyCost(analyzer, userId)
  match currentCost
    Ok(cost) ->
      profile["estimatedNextMonth"] = cost
      Ok(cost)
    Err(msg) -> Err(msg)

fn getUserCostHistory(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  userId: string,
  months: number
) -> Result<array<CostEntry>, string>
  let profile = analyzer["userProfiles"][userId]
  if profile == nil
    return Err("User profile not found")

  let result = []
  let cutoffTime = getCurrentTime() - (months * 30 * 24 * 60 * 60)

  for entry in profile["costHistory"]
    if entry["timestamp"] >= cutoffTime
      result.append(entry)

  Ok(result)

fn generateMonthlyInvoice(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  userId: string
) -> Result<map<string, any>, string>
  let profile = analyzer["userProfiles"][userId]
  if profile == nil
    return Err("User profile not found")

  let cost = calculateMonthlyCost(analyzer, userId)
  match cost
    Ok(totalCost) ->
      let invoice = {
        "userId": userId,
        "invoiceId": generateInvoiceId(),
        "billingDate": getCurrentTime(),
        "dueDate": getCurrentTime() + (30 * 24 * 60 * 60),
        "tier": profile["tierName"],
        "baseMonthlyFee": analyzer["pricingTiers"][profile["tierName"]]["baseMonthlyFee"],
        "vectorsCost": profile["usageMetrics"]["vectorsCreated"] * analyzer["pricingTiers"][profile["tierName"]]["vectorCost"],
        "requestsCost": profile["usageMetrics"]["requestsProcessed"] * analyzer["pricingTiers"][profile["tierName"]]["requestCost"],
        "storageCost": profile["usageMetrics"]["storageUsedGB"] * analyzer["pricingTiers"][profile["tierName"]]["storageCost"],
        "bandwidthCost": profile["usageMetrics"]["bandwidthUsedGB"] * analyzer["pricingTiers"][profile["tierName"]]["bandwidthCost"],
        "computeCost": profile["usageMetrics"]["computeMinutes"] * analyzer["pricingTiers"][profile["tierName"]]["computeCost"],
        "totalCost": totalCost,
        "status": "PENDING"
      }
      Ok(invoice)
    Err(msg) -> Err(msg)

fn calculateRevenueByTier(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer
) -> map<string, number>
  let revenueByTier = {}

  for entry in analyzer["costEntries"]
    let profile = analyzer["userProfiles"][entry["userId"]]
    if profile != nil
      let tier = profile["tierName"]
      revenueByTier[tier] = (revenueByTier[tier] || 0) + entry["totalCost"]

  revenueByTier

fn getTotalMonthlyRevenue(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  billingPeriod: string
) -> number
  let total = 0

  for entry in analyzer["costEntries"]
    if entry["billingPeriod"] == billingPeriod
      total = total + entry["totalCost"]

  total

fn getTopSpendingUsers(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  limit: number
) -> array<map<string, any>>
  let userCosts = {}

  for entry in analyzer["costEntries"]
    userCosts[entry["userId"]] = (userCosts[entry["userId"]] || 0) + entry["totalCost"]

  let result = []
  for userId in userCosts.keys()
    result.append({
      "userId": userId,
      "totalCost": userCosts[userId]
    })

  // Sort by cost (descending)
  for i = 0 to result.length()
    for j = 0 to result.length() - 1
      if result[j]["totalCost"] < result[j + 1]["totalCost"]
        let temp = result[j]
        result[j] = result[j + 1]
        result[j + 1] = temp

  // Return top limit
  let topUsers = []
  for i = 0 to limit
    if i < result.length()
      topUsers.append(result[i])

  topUsers

fn upgradeTier(
  analyzer: CostAnalyzer,
  userId: string,
  newTierName: string
) -> Result<UserBillingProfile, string>
  let profile = analyzer["userProfiles"][userId]
  if profile == nil
    return Err("User profile not found")

  let newTier = analyzer["pricingTiers"][newTierName]
  if newTier == nil
    return Err("Tier not found")

  profile["tierName"] = newTierName
  Ok(profile)

fn generateCostId() -> string
  let id = ""
  for i = 0 to 12
    id = id + toString((i * 19 + 31) % 16)
  "cost-" + id

fn generateInvoiceId() -> string
  let id = ""
  for i = 0 to 8
    id = id + toString((i * 23 + 37) % 16)
  "inv-" + id

fn getCurrentBillingPeriod() -> string
  "2026-03"

fn getCurrentTime() -> number
  1740998400

//                           Dashboard + Tracing + Alerts + Cost Analysis (613줄)

// Group A: Web3 Integration Tests (5개)

    messages.append({
      "messageId": "msg" + toString(i),

    })

    return true

fn testStreamingConnection() -> bool

  }

// Group C: Multi-tenant Isolation Tests (5개)

fn testTenantCreation() -> bool

fn testQuotaEnforcement() -> bool

    "maxConcurrentConnections": 50,

  }

  if quota["maxVectors"] > 0 && quota["featureFlags"].length() > 0
    return true

fn testResourceAllocation() -> bool
  let resource = {
    "tenantId": "tenant1",
